## Risk Areas / 风险区域

- [ ] AccessibilityService / screen content / 无障碍服务或屏幕内容
- [ ] Gestures or text input / 手势或文本输入
- [ ] Dynamic skills / 动态 Skill
- [ ] Python or shell execution / Python 或 Shell 执行
- [ ] WebView / JavaScript bridge / WebView 或 JavaScript Bridge
- [ ] VPN / proxy / VPN 或代理
- [ ] Local or LAN API server / 本地或局域网 API Server
- [ ] File or media access / 文件或媒体访问
- [ ] Model prompt, memory, or tool observations / 模型提示词、记忆或工具 observation
- [ ] None of the above / 以上都不涉及

## Screenshots Or Recording / 截图或录屏

Add screenshots or a short recording for UI, permission, and automation changes.

如果涉及 UI、权限流程或自动化行为，请附截图或短录屏。

## Checklist / 清单

- [ ] I removed secrets and private data from logs and screenshots.
- [ ] I kept the change focused and did not mix unrelated refactors.
- [ ] I documented known limitations.
- [ ] I updated docs or recipes when behavior changed.

- [ ] 我已从日志和截图中移除密钥与隐私数据。
- [ ] 我控制了改动范围，没有混入无关重构。
- [ ] 我记录了已知限制。
- [ ] 如果行为发生变化，我已更新文档或 recipe。
